question: Does the output generally follow the interleaved format, alternating or mixing text and images rather than presenting all images at the end?
Does the output contain exactly 4 generated images (1 final logo + 3 application mockups)?
Is the 'Final Version' logo image presented first in the sequence, followed by the three application mockups?
Does the generated 'Final Version' logo successfully combine the simplified graphic style from Revision 2 (Image 3) with the blue color scheme from the Original Version (Image 1)?
Is the 'Final Version' logo strictly colored using the requested Deep Navy/Sky Blue/White palette, with no traces of the green color scheme from the revisions?
Does the 'Final Version' logo clearly include the text elements 'NEXON DYNAMICS' and 'EST. 2019'?
Is the generated logo image high-quality, with legible text and no significant artifacts or distortions?
Is the specific 'Final Version' logo design (Blue + Simplified Graphics) used consistently as the subject across all three subsequent mockup images?
Does the first mockup image depict the logo placed on a dark-colored business card background as requested?
Does the design note accompanying the business card mockup include specific physical dimensions (e.g., 3.5x2 inches, 90x55mm)?
Does the design note for the business card include craft or process recommendations (e.g., paper stock, foil stamping, UV coating)?
Does the second mockup image display the logo in the context of a mobile app splash screen (e.g., phone screen interface)?
Does the design note accompanying the splash screen mockup include specific pixel dimensions or resolution recommendations (e.g., 1080x1920)?
Does the design note for the splash screen include technical specifications suitable for digital display (e.g., RGB color mode, PNG/SVG file format)?
Does the third mockup image visually demonstrate glass material characteristics (e.g., transparency, reflection, frosting) for the door decal?
Does the design note accompanying the glass door decal mockup include physical dimensions appropriate for a door or decal application?
Does the design note for the glass door decal include material or installation recommendations (e.g., vinyl type, reverse printing, transfer tape)?
Does the text adjacent to each mockup image accurately describe the specific scenario shown (e.g., text about business cards is next to the business card image)?
